name: The Siege of Gondor
packName: ALeP - The Siege of Gondor Nightmare

name: The Siege of Gondor
packName: ALeP - The Siege of Gondor Nightmare

name: The Viper
packName: ALeP - The Siege of Gondor Nightmare
text: Forced: At the beginning of the Travel phase, discard the top card of the Encounter deck. If it is has the Corsair trait, put it into play engaged with the first player. Response: After this quest is added to the victory display, if there are 2 or more side quests with the Ship trait in the victory display, remove 1 resource from The Corsair Fleet.

name: The Scorpion
packName: ALeP - The Siege of Gondor Nightmare
text: Forced: At the beginning of the Travel phase, discard the top card of the Encounter deck. If it is a location, add it to the staging area. Response: After this quest is added to the victory display, if there are 2 or more side quests with the Ship trait in the victory display, remove 1 resource from The Corsair Fleet.

name: The Great Ape
packName: ALeP - The Siege of Gondor Nightmare
text: Forced: At the beginning of the Travel phase, discard the top card of the Encounter deck. If it is a treachery, reveal it. Response: After this quest is added to the victory display, if there are 2 or more side quests with the Ship trait in the victory display, remove 1 resource from The Corsair Fleet.

name: The Mûmak
packName: ALeP - The Siege of Gondor Nightmare
text: Forced: At the beginning of the Travel phase, discard the top card of the Encounter deck. Raise each player’s threat by X, where X is twice the threat of the discarded card. Response: After this quest is added to the victory display, if there are 2 or more side quests with the Ship trait in the victory display, remove 1 resource from The Corsair Fleet.

name: Great Corsair Ship
packName: ALeP - The Siege of Gondor Nightmare
text: X is the number of resources on The Corsair Fleet. The players cannot travel here unless there are at least 2[pp] cards with the Ship trait in the victory display. Travel: Each player searches the encounter deck and discard pile for a Corsair enemy and adds it to the staging area. One of those enemies must be Corsair Captain, if able.

name: Bays of Gondor
packName: ALeP - The Siege of Gondor Nightmare
text: The players cannot travel to Bays of Gondor. Forced: When the encounter deck is shuffled, either each player raises their threat by 3, or place 1 resource token on The Corsair Fleet.

name: Umbar Longboat
packName: ALeP - The Siege of Gondor Nightmare
text: Cannot attack. Immune to player card effects. Forced: When Umbar Longboat is dealt a shadow card, look at it. If it has the Corsair trait, engage it and deal it a shadow card.

name: Corsair Boatswain
packName: ALeP - The Siege of Gondor Nightmare
text: Corsair Boatswain gets +1 [threat], +1 [attack], +1 [defense] and +1 hit point for each Ship in play. Forced: When Corsair Boatswain is dealt a shadow card, look at it. If it has the Ship trait, add it to the staging area.
shadow: Shadow: Either raise your threat by 5, or this attack is considered undefended.

name: Corsair Reinforcements
packName: ALeP - The Siege of Gondor Nightmare
text: When Revealed: Shuffle the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck. Discard cards from the encounter deck until a card with the Ship trait is discarded, and add that card to the staging area.
shadow: Shadow: Exhaust a character you control.

name: Run Aground!
packName: ALeP - The Siege of Gondor Nightmare
text: When Revealed: Choose a non-unique enemy or side quest with the Ship trait in play. Deal 4 damage to it if it is an enemy, or place 4 progress on it if it is a side quest. Then, deal 4 damage among exhausted characters you control. If a card with the Ship trait leaves play this way, this card gains surge.
